title: ide_state.zip
text: ide_state.zip The ide_state.zip file contains information about the state of the Uniface IDE session when it was last closed, including open editors, active worksheets, current tabs, sort order, and so on. The file is automatically created and managed by the Uniface IDE, and is used to restore the IDE to the same state when it is started again. It is not possible to use the same state file for multiple IDE sessions or for multiple versions of Uniface. The ide_state.zip must be compatible with the current version of the Uniface IDE. If the Uniface IDE detects that the current version of the state file is not compatible (for example, after installing a patch), it automatically removes the state, uses the default (compiled-in) state, and informs the user with a message in the Message Frame. For example: 4400 - The IDE's state has been reset due to an update. Main controller state is incompatible – all state files are dropped. 4401 - The IDE's state for OjectType : ObjectName has been reset due to an update. UDO controller state is incompatible – the state for this editor is reset to default state. Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
